'''âs-y-p-w''' ('''kasaypewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wraggle|wraggle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wraggle|wraggle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-y-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| kasaypewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaypewoko|thisaypewoko]] || [[word:jisaypewoko|jisaypewoko]] || [[word:shisaypewoko|shisaypewoko]] || [[word:kisaypewoko|kisaypewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
